channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Black coaches have shot at college football title a generation after that milestone was hit in hoops
item.description: In college basketball, the scene of an African-American coach cutting down nets to celebrate a national title is nothing new.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Orange Bowl weather forecast: What to expect in Miami for Penn State-Notre Dame
item.description: Penn State is set to take on the Notre Dame in what is sure to be a entertaining Orange Bowl semifinal matchup. With so many travelling to show support for the Nittany Lions, fans can expect to be greeted by mild but cooler than average weather.
item.dc:creator: Jackson Chastain, PHL 17

item.title: Santa Cruz surfer Nat Young shreds during chilly afternoon session – wearing a bikini
item.description: When professional surfer Nat Young isn't competing at the World Surf League competitions around the world, it's not uncommon to see him shredding at Steamer Lane, his heralded hometown break.
item.dc:creator: Jim Seimas, The Mercury News

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get ready for the Australian Open before play begins with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is, who the defending champions are and more: When i
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bears put Cowboys in coaching dilemma after requesting to interview Mike McCarthy: reports
item.description: The Chicago Bears appear to be speeding up the Dallas Cowboys' decision regarding head coach Mike McCarthy, as they have reportedly requested to interview him for their vacancy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: John Cena's farewell tour begins with major announcement on RAW's Netflix premiere
item.description: John Cena made a big announcement as his farewell tour in his final year of WWE participation began on Monday night, proclaiming he will win Royal Rumble 2025.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Dan Campbell deserves to win Coach of the Year award over Vikings coach
item.description: Dan Campbell has swept his division, won the NFC North consecutively, and clinched the best record in the conference and the entire league while missing half his roster due to injury.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: NFL coaching searches have complicated rules about timing and interviews
item.description: The overlap of the NFL playoffs and coaching search season will have many of the league’s top assistants pulling double duty this month.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The 49ers fire special teams coordinator Brian Schneider, AP source says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers fired special teams coach Brian Schneider following a season when repeated blunders in the kicking contributed to a losing season, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Column: Bears need leaders on the line alongside Caleb Williams in 2025
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — While the 2024 season was every single bit of a disaster, the Chicago Bears' win over the Green Bay Packers at Lambeau Field Sunday provided a glimmer of hope. It could also double as a springboard into a pivotal offseason.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Sheel Seidler, wife of late Padres owner, sues in-laws for control of the team
item.description: The wife of late San Diego Padres owner Peter Seidler, Sheel Seidler, sued brothers-in-law Matthew and Robert on Monday, attempting to prevent another brother, John, from taking control of the team rather than her.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tough, old school defense a calling card for all four teams left in the national championship hunt
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — The expanded College Football Playoff has a decidedly old-school feel: Smothering defenses have carried the last four teams still in the hunt for the national championship. If you want offense, look elsewhere this weekend.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden signs RFK Stadium land bill into law, a step toward potential Commanders stadium in Washington
item.description: President Joe Biden signed into law a bill that transfers the land that includes the old RFK Stadium from the federal government to city control, the next step to potentially pave the way for the NFL's Washington Commanders to return to the nation's capital.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patriots owner Robert Kraft says he put Jerod Mayo in 'untenable situation,' vows to correct course
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — When Robert Kraft hired Jerod Mayo a year ago, he felt he’d identified the right person to follow the championship legacy left by Bill Belichick. In hindsight, Kraft now believes Mayo wasn’t quite ready to be an NFL head coach.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: David Wright's No. 5 to be retired by New York Mets on July 19
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — David Wright's No. 5 will be retired by the New York Mets before a July 19 game against Cincinnati, the team said Monday. Wright's number will be the 10th retired by the Mets, the sixth since Steve Cohen bought the team ahead of the 2021 season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rays 'expect' city to repair Tropicana Field by Opening Day 2026
item.description: Tampa Bay Rays leaders now say they "support and expect" the City of St. Petersburg to repair hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field by Opening Day of the 2026 season.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Holiday Classic: Lincoln Stockton 64, Mission Bay 45
item.description: In the American Bracket Championship Game of the 2024 Holiday Classic, Lincoln High School from Stockton, CA defeated Mission Bay 64-45.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5
